archetype.name: Code Coy
archetype.description: Deploys like a hero, but nobody sees the fireworks.

headerText: 736 days, 0 stars: The pale light of a sunrise in the void.

roastLines.text: 14 repos, 4 inactive—your portfolio is less active than your dad’s gym membership.
TypeScript, Python, Java? Maybe you’re just using the alphabet to impress recruiters.
87 hireability? Only if the hiring manager is a bot that likes pixel art and 1‑liner scripts.

improvements.text: Add real projects, not tutorial clones, and break up the 736‑day zombie cycle.
Show at least one repo with >0 stars—some public validation cracks the ice.

positiveEnding: You’ve mastered the art of being an invisible coder—nice dedication.
